news.title: Oil slips after OPEC+ agrees to raise output targets
news.summary: Oil fell on Monday after OPEC+ agreed to further increase output targets from August while exports from key producers via the Strait are recovering, potentially adding to global supplies.

news.title: Dollar near two-week lows as rate-hike bets recede, embattled yen in focus
news.summary: The U.S. dollar steadied near a 2-week low on Monday as investors scaled back bets on a Fed rate hike this year, while the yen remained near a 40-year low.

news.title: OPEC+ raises output levels again despite tumbling crude prices
news.summary: Major oil producers on Sunday agreed once again to modestly increase their crude production, although, as in previous months, the hike is largely symbolic until a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran sticks and the Strait of Hormuz is fully reopened to shipping traffic.

news.summary: Iranian state TV showed Khamenei's sons Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud praying at the funeral. Supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei was not seen.
